result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
         DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months' AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
    NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.today
  WHERE LOWER(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.case_count > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.case_count DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
         DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months' AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
    NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.today
  WHERE LOWER(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.case_count > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.case_count DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS today,
         TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months' AS start_ts
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    (ch.createddate)::timestamp AS created_ts,
    NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.oldvalue__c), '') AS old_owner,
    NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ch.newvalue__c), '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON (ch.createddate)::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND (ch.createddate)::timestamp < p.today
  WHERE LOWER(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.case_count > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.case_count DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
